title: helia loranthoides
intro: Helia loranthoides, also known as the helia or helia vine, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of helia loranthoides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
